title: Change 'Pune's Most Trusted' tagline to black with professional font

requirements.summary: Update Hero section tagline to deep black color and professional serif font
acceptanceCriteria: The tagline 'Pune's Most Trusted Real Estate Business' in the Hero section is rendered in deep black (#111111 or near-black).
The tagline uses a professional serif font (e.g., Playfair Display) consistent with the site's luxury typography pairing.
The tagline is clearly legible against the hero background with no visibility issues.
No other text elements or sections are unintentionally altered.

file_operations.description: Update the tagline 'Pune's Most Trusted Real Estate Business' to use deep black color (#111111) and apply the Playfair Display serif font (already configured in tailwind.config.js as font-playfair). Locate the tagline text element in the Hero component and modify its className to include text-[#111111] and font-playfair while preserving all other existing styling and layout properties. Ensure the text remains clearly legible against the hero background image.
